---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to prototype generation, requirements notes, examples, or workflow guidance
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Briefly describe the feature or improvement.

## Problem to Solve

What problem does this address?

## Proposed Direction

Describe the change you want to see.

## Expected Benefit

How would this improve the skill, examples, or collaboration workflow?

## Affected Area

For example:

- page-mode guidance
- requirements-note schema
- example prototypes
- navigation rules
- QA workflow
- review workflow

## Extra Context

Add examples, screenshots, references, or comparable patterns if helpful.
